title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 in predicting drug toxicity, designing new drugs, and generating antibodies. Applications include cell labeling based on gene activity, cancer drug discovery, and drug repurposing.
